checks.basis: LDR in the dark: R >= 1 MOhm (GL5528 datasheet dark-resistance minimum). Tap = 5V * R_FIXED/(R_LDR + R_FIXED) = 5 * 10k/(1M + 10k) = 0.0495V. Compared to 2.500V at 10 lux, the tap collapsed as the top-leg resistance rose ~100x: LDR light-dependent behavior. Window +/-10% [0.045, 0.055] absorbs the '>= 1M' floor (a darker cell reads even lower) and solver reltol.
